lane_claim:
STRICT SYMBOL-INHABITATION CONTRACT. Use $autonomous-orchestrator only; do not use Codex built-in subagents. Leaf worker unless SECTION MANAGER. Own exactly the named target. Allowed exits only: (1) Agda source diff + targeted validation passes; (2) Agda source diff + exact Agda stderr naming missing upstream type/symbol; (3) empty diff + named authority-boundary escalation with exact receipt shape. Forbidden: docs-only, audit-only, blocker-map-only, scaffold-only, new postulate, weakened theorem, false promotion. Touch only target module and direct imports. Include exact validation command.
TARGET: DASHI.Physics.Closure.YangMillsFieldEquationObstruction.missingGaugeCompatibilityOfBianchiLaw. Module: DASHI/Physics/Closure/YangMillsFieldEquationObstruction.agda. Attempt to inhabit/advance the gauge-compatibility Bianchi law from existing flat plaquette Stokes/Jacobi witness, selected exterior derivative squared-zero witness, finite SU(3) Jacobi residual, and SFGC transport/gauge compatibility records.
